recommendations.name: Stone Diffuser
recommendations.description: Hand-finished porcelain essential oil diffuser. Whisper-quiet. Doubles as décor.
recommendations.whyThisFits: Lisa's yoga practice and wellness journey would be beautifully complemented by this hand-finished porcelain diffuser that doubles as elegant home décor. It creates a calming atmosphere that bridges her love of design with her commitment to wellness.
recommendations.giftAngle: Something beautiful that makes your yoga space even more serene
recommendations.whatThisSays: This says: 'I see how you create peaceful moments in your day, and I want to add another layer of calm to those rituals.'
recommendations.usageSignal: She'll turn it on every evening when the day winds down

recommendations.name: Zafu Natural Meditation Cushion
recommendations.description: Beautiful round pleated cushion filled with buckwheat hulls. Muted tones. Free shipping in Canada.
recommendations.whyThisFits: Lisa's yoga practice deserves a dedicated meditation spot, and this beautiful pleated cushion in muted tones speaks to both her wellness focus and design aesthetic. It creates a permanent sacred space in her home.
recommendations.giftAngle: Your own special spot for meditation and quiet moments
recommendations.whatThisSays: This says: 'Your wellness practice is important enough to have its own beautiful space in our home.'
recommendations.usageSignal: Becomes their permanent spot on the living room floor

recommendations.name: Annual Membership
recommendations.description: 200+ classes from world experts. Cooking, writing, music, business, wellness. Gift-wrapped email.
recommendations.whyThisFits: Connects to Lisa's interest in reading — a experiential pick that fits naturally into their life.
recommendations.giftAngle: Give it with a note about why you picked this one specifically for Lisa.
recommendations.whatThisSays: This says: 'I see your wellness journey and want to be part of it, bringing calm and support'
recommendations.usageSignal: A new world-class teacher every weekend

recommendations.name: Handwoven Pashmina Bandana in Black
recommendations.description: The Kardo Handwoven Pashmina Bandana is made from 100% handwoven pashmina and finished with raw edges to maintain its natural texture. Designed for ve
recommendations.whyThisFits: Sam's minimalist style meets artisan craftsmanship in this versatile piece that could work as a guitar strap alternative or simply elevate his clean aesthetic. The handwoven quality and raw edges give it character without clutter.
recommendations.giftAngle: Something handmade that fits your style perfectly - minimal but with soul, just like your music.
recommendations.whatThisSays: This says: 'I see how you appreciate quality over quantity, and I found something that honors both your artistic side and your clean aesthetic.'

recommendations.name: Aesop Olous Aromatique Room Spray
recommendations.description: A blend of citrus botanicals, balanced by breaking waves of cedar and the refreshing spice of cardamom. 100ml Key Ingredients: Galbanum, grapefruit,
recommendations.whyThisFits: The sophisticated cedar and citrus blend would create the perfect atmosphere for Sam's guitar practice sessions, while the minimalist Aesop packaging aligns with his clean aesthetic. This transforms his space without adding clutter.
recommendations.giftAngle: For setting the mood during your practice sessions - thought you'd appreciate how this could enhance your musical space.
recommendations.whatThisSays: This says: 'I want to support not just your passion, but the entire environment where your creativity happens.'
recommendations.usageSignal: He'll spritz this before every practice session, creating a ritual that enhances his musical focus

recommendations.name: The ReNew Transit Weekender | Nutria
recommendations.description: The ReNew Transit Weekender is fully featured—padded laptop sleeve, two water bottle holders, exterior zip pocket, luggage handle pass-through (that's also a pocket), and multiple ways to carry: crossbody, shoulder, or in-hand. Oh, and it’s made using 100% recycled polyester from recycled plastic bo
recommendations.whyThisFits: This unexpected choice anticipates Sam's need for a quality travel companion for gigs or craft beer adventures. The eco-conscious materials and laptop protection show thoughtful consideration for his lifestyle beyond just music.
recommendations.giftAngle: Figured you might need something solid for weekend trips - whether it's checking out new breweries or hauling gear to jam sessions.
recommendations.whatThisSays: This says: 'I see your whole life, not just your hobbies, and I want you to have quality gear for all your adventures.'
recommendations.usageSignal: He'll use this for weekend getaways, brewery tours, and anytime he needs to transport his laptop and essentials in style

recommendations.name: Craft Cocktail Kit
recommendations.description: Premium pre-mixed cocktails. Negroni, Old Fashioned, or Margarita. Just pour over ice.
recommendations.whyThisFits: Someone who hosts dinner parties needs sophisticated cocktails to match, and this lets her serve bar-quality drinks without the complexity - perfect for impressing guests while keeping her focused on the cooking.
recommendations.giftAngle: Frame it as the secret to effortless entertaining - now she can serve craft cocktails that taste like they took hours to make.
recommendations.whatThisSays: This says: 'I know you put thought into every detail of your gatherings, and this will let you elevate the drink experience without extra stress.'
recommendations.usageSignal: She'll pour these at every dinner party - instant sophistication in 30 seconds

recommendations.name: Spectrum Planner
recommendations.description: Beautifully designed undated planner with color-coded sections. Art-meets-function.
recommendations.whyThisFits: This beautifully designed planner bridges her artistic sensibilities with practical organization — the color-coded sections and art-meets-function approach means she can plan her creative projects and daily life in something that feels like an extension of her artistic identity.
recommendations.giftAngle: A planner that's too beautiful to ignore, designed for creative minds who need both inspiration and organization.
recommendations.whatThisSays: This says: 'I know you're creative AND organized, and you deserve tools that honor both sides of who you are.'
recommendations.usageSignal: She'll use it daily to plan art projects, sketch ideas, and organize her creative life

recommendations.name: Easy Build Closed Terrarium Kit
recommendations.description: DIY closed terrarium with live moss and everything included. Self-sustaining ecosystem in a glass jar.
recommendations.whyThisFits: While she loves traditional art forms, this introduces her to a completely different kind of creative expression — designing and building a living, breathing ecosystem. It's hands-on creativity with a scientific twist that could spark new artistic inspiration.
recommendations.giftAngle: A different kind of art project — one that grows and evolves long after she finishes creating it.
recommendations.whatThisSays: This says: 'Your creativity extends beyond the canvas, and I want you to discover new ways to create beautiful things.'
recommendations.usageSignal: She'll spend an afternoon building it, then watch her tiny ecosystem thrive for months
